title: ICUD-EAU International Consultation on Bladder Cancer 2012: Pathology.
authors: International Consultation on Urologic Disease-European Association of Urology Consultation on Bladder Cancer 2012
author_string: Amin, Mahul B, McKenney, Jesse K, Paner, Gladell P, Hansel, Donna E, Grignon, David J et al.
abstract: To present a summary of the 2nd International Consultation on Bladder Cancer recommendations on the pathology of bladder cancer using an evidence-based strategy. To standardize descriptions of the diagnosis and reporting of urothelial carcinoma of the bladder and help optimize uniformity between individual pathology practices and institutions. A detailed Medline analysis was performed for original articles addressing bladder cancer with regard to pathology. Proceedings from the last 5 yr of major conferences were also searched. The major findings are presented in an evidence-based fashion. Large retrospective and prospective data were analyzed. Providing the best management for patients with bladder neoplasia relies on close cooperation and teamwork among urologists, oncologists, radiologists, and pathologists.
